science.description: The four astronauts of NASA's Artemis II mission entered the moon's gravitational sphere of influence early Monday morning as they cruised along a path that will soon take them over the shadowed, lunar far side to become the farthest-flying humans in history.

ai.title: Keel laying of fourth fast patrol vessel to enhance Coast Guard capabilities
ai.description: The Indian Coast Guard held a keel-laying ceremony for its fourth fast patrol vessel. This is part of a 14-ship project for coastal security and search and rescue. The vessels are being built under the 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' initiative. They will feature advanced technology, including AI-based maintenance and drones. This marks a key milestone for the project.
